institution: Esc. Sup. N° 49 Cap. Justo José de Urquiza

degree.es: Higher Technician in Functional Analysis of Computer Systems
degree.en: Higher Technician in Functional Analysis of Computer Systems

description.es: Specialized training in Functional Analysis, elicitation and specification of functional requirements and design of IT solutions. Experience in requirements elicitation techniques (interviews, workshops, observation) and stakeholder management. Proficiency in UML (Use Case, Sequence, Class, Activity, and State Diagrams) for system modeling. Business process modeling, database design, and application of agile and traditional methodologies. Professional internships applying the complete functional analysis cycle: elicitation → specification → validation with users.
description.en: Specialized training in Functional Analysis, elicitation and specification of functional requirements and design of IT solutions. Experience in requirements elicitation techniques (interviews, workshops, observation) and stakeholder management. Proficiency in UML (Use Case, Sequence, Class, Activity, and State Diagrams) for system modeling. Business process modeling, database design, and application of agile and traditional methodologies. Professional internships applying the complete functional analysis cycle: elicitation → specification → validation with users.

description.es: Comprehensive technical training in professional and personal IT, with a solid foundation in hardware, software, and networks. Programming in structured and object-oriented languages, along with database fundamentals. Practical experience in equipment maintenance, operating system installation, and user technical support.
description.en: Comprehensive technical training in professional and personal IT, with a solid foundation in hardware, software, and networks. Programming in structured and object-oriented languages, along with database fundamentals. Practical experience in equipment maintenance, operating system installation, and user technical support.
